testing_centers.notes: ACP (Creative Cloud) exams delivered via Certiport at authorized test centers.
Adobe Experience Cloud professional/expert exams (AD0-E series) delivered via Pearson VUE. Online proctoring available.

id_requirements: One government-issued photo ID with full name. Name must match registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No notes or reference materials. ACP exams include both multiple-choice questions and performance-based tasks in a simulated application environment. AD0-E series exams are multiple-choice only.
renewal_options: ACP (Creative Cloud) certifications are version-specific and do not expire but may become outdated with new software versions. Adobe Experience Cloud certifications (AD0-E series) are valid for 2 years; renewal by passing a current renewal exam at no charge.

prerequisites.description: Minimum 2 years experience with Adobe Analytics; familiarity with digital analytics and reporting

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period between attempts. Full exam fee required for retake. Third and subsequent attempts require 14-day waiting period.

official_study_resources.title: Adobe Certification Exam Guides
official_study_resources.notes: Official exam guides and study materials available on Adobe Learning

official_study_resources.title: Adobe Experience League
official_study_resources.notes: Free courses, tutorials, and practice resources on Adobe Experience League
